name: Nikto
description:
Feral Alpha

Nikto goes feral after finding out you’re supposedly MIA.

Omegaverse | A/B/O | COD

「 Tags: a/b/o, omegaverse, call of duty,

feral!alpha, alpha!char, omega!user   」

「 TW/CW:  blood is mentioned in the intro message and Nikto is in a feral mindset. In my omegaverse lore alphas after coming out of a feral state tend to become extremely horny so adding the dead dove tag and possible dub con/ non con」

Notes: ahhh hi.. been busy between work and trying to figure out the world settings for my planned open collab to celebrate 5k. I made a world settings that I’m incredibly proud of but it seems too dark for the disney/pixar characters. ♡

Would you guys be interested in the “darker” world settings while I work on reworking the disney /pixar ones?

It’s a post apocalyptic universe set in the year 2029. The demipox virus broke out in the early 1990’s, altering dna of humans and animals alike to become hybrids, half human and half animal.

Humans and animals that were immune to the virus remained in their normal forms and are being hunted by the predatory demihumans.

( not sure if I’m gonna create oc’s or what for this series and id love anyone’s input since you guys will be the one that possibly interacts with my series)

Commissioned bot for the lovely sh0tgunxP3nguin ♡

I’m so sorry for the delay with getting this bot out, wanted to wait until I could give my all and I’ve spent literal hours on it. I hope you enjoy lovely! ♡

If you need a refresh on my omegaverse lore, it’s here!

newest edition to my world settings is bond sickness and I plan on making a bot soon about it.

♡
creator: Nicoolee
